name: Prof. Yen-Wen Lu
bio: Professor Lu leads interdisciplinary research connecting microsystems, sensing, artificial intelligence, and translational engineering.
bioZh: 盧教授帶領跨領域研究，整合微系統、感測、人工智慧與工程轉譯應用。

name: Postdoctoral & Research Team
bio: Researchers contribute independent project execution, mentoring, and system-level integration.
bioZh: 研究人員負責獨立執行計畫、協助指導與系統層級整合。

name: Graduate Students
bio: Graduate students receive training from experimental design through publication and technology demonstration.
bioZh: 研究生接受從實驗設計、研究執行到論文發表與技術展示的完整訓練。

name: Alumni Network
bio: Alumni continue their careers in leading technology companies, research institutes, and universities.
bioZh: 校友於指標性科技企業、研究機構與大學持續發展。
